response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack engineering experience with a strong match on the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. Demonstrates architecture ownership, TDD/CI discipline, and breadth across backend, frontend, and DevOps that align tightly with the role's responsibilities.
strengths: Direct primary-stack match (TypeScript/Node.js/React) with 10+ years full-stack depth
Current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience matches a key required skill
Proven engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, architecture, workshops and talks
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed on the resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure is older and narrow
Seniority (Staff) may be above the mid-senior IC framing of the role
